title: Super Sushi Samurai - REKT
relevance_summary: Double minting exploit via contract bug in transfer function

prevention.rule: Block any tx that involves multiple transfers to the same address in quick succession.

red_flags: Multiple transfers to the same address in quick succession
monitoring_rules: Block any tx that involves multiple transfers to the same address in quick succession.
summary: The Super Sushi Samurai LP was drained due to a critical bug in the token contract allowing users to double their token balance by transferring to their own address. A whitehat hacker claimed to have rescued the funds and offered reimbursement.
